name: Dear Life Co.,Ltd.
summary: Dear Life Co.,Ltd. engages in the real estate business in Japan. It develops residential, commercial, and office buildings; provides real estate planning, design, construction supervision services, etc.; resells residential properties; and invests in real estate properties. The company also provides temporary staffing services for the real estate industry; advertising services; and outsourcing services, such as payment management and delinquency guarantee services to trunk room/rental storage space operator; and operates rental storage spaces. It sells its property through real estate agencies. Dear Life Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
